description: §16.2 Workflow-tier dashboard 1/5 — Hatchet AI + Ingestion pool execution health. Reads from workflow.workflow_runs and the silver answer_runs telemetry the orchestrator emits.

panels.title: Hatchet workflow runs/min by pool
panels.description: Throughput of the AI pool (LLM-driven agents) vs the Ingestion pool (Dagster-backed parser tasks). Source: workflow.workflow_runs.started_at.

panels.title: Workflow failure rate by kind (%)
panels.description: Failures / total per workflow_kind. Status field on workflow.workflow_runs is one of: started / succeeded / failed / cancelled.

panels.title: Workflow duration p95 by kind (s)
panels.description: End-to-end Hatchet run duration. completed_at - started_at. p95 to surface tail-latency regressions.

panels.title: Retry exhaustion / dead-letter rate (req/s)
panels.description: Workflows that exhausted the configured retries policy. Failure here is the strongest signal of upstream-service degradation: an answer_run or ingestion task hit retries=0 after the policy's max-attempts ran out.

panels.title: Workflows registered (AI pool)
panels.description: Live worker registration check. Sum of workflows discovered + registered at worker startup. Drop below the expected count (typically 8-12 depending on doc-phase) means the worker is misconfigured or a new graduation hasn't restarted the worker.

panels.title: Workflows registered (ingestion pool)
panels.description: Live worker registration check for the ingestion pool. Typically 6-10 workflows.

panels.title: Recent dead-letter rows (audit ledger)
panels.description: audit.audit_ledger rows where action_type='workflow.dead_letter'. Cross-reference workflow_run_id with workflow.workflow_runs.

title: GeoRAG — Workflows (Hatchet)
